intent: Turns vague intent into an executable spec — testable acceptance criteria, an explicit non-goals list, edge cases, and a clean handoff to the build loop.

dimensions.name: acceptance-criteria
dimensions.criterion: Produces acceptance criteria phrased as testable behaviours.

dimensions.name: explicit-scope
dimensions.criterion: States what is out of scope — an explicit non-goals list.

dimensions.name: edge-cases
dimensions.criterion: Surfaces the edge cases the happy path ignores.

dimensions.name: handoff
dimensions.criterion: Breaks the work into tasks and hands off to the build loop.
